title: senecio berlandieri
intro: Senecio berlandieri, also known as gray horse gentian or Berlandier's ragwort, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Senecio berlandieri include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, and can be found in various forms in traditional medicine, including infusions and poultices.
